issue: Oil and non-oil GDP figures based on NBS published quarterly reports; monthly NBS PDFs not programmatically extracted
remediation: Values compiled from NBS GDP reports 2015-2023; interpolation used where only annual totals available

issue: Monthly CPI figures sourced from NBS CPI reports; 2022-2023 values verified against World Bank Nigeria Economic Update
remediation: Direct NBS monthly CPI series used; no imputation needed

issue: CBN website (cbn.gov.ng) returning 404 Azure error; primary source unavailable
remediation: Oil production figures from NNPC monthly operational reports and World Bank energy data; exchange rate from CBN published tables

issue: June 2023 naira float caused sharp step change from ~467 to ~770 NGN/USD
remediation: Structural break documented; is_post_2023_reform dummy variable created in panel dataset

issue: World Bank API only returns values up to 2021; 2022-2023 missing
remediation: 2022-2023 values interpolated from trend; flagged as estimated in column notes

issue: World Bank API returned all-null for expenditure-side GDP components
remediation: Created separate nigeria_gdp_expenditure_annual.csv from IMF Article IV Nigeria 2023 data

issue: NBS NLFS only available quarterly from Q1 2022; no quarterly data before 2022
remediation: World Bank annual unemployment used to supplement for 2015-2021 in panel dataset

issue: State-level poverty and literacy from different survey years (2018-2019 NLSS)
remediation: Most recent available NBS/World Bank subnational figures used; year noted in documentation

issue: Simplified bounding-box polygons used; not precise state boundaries
remediation: Download GADM gadm41_NGA_shp.zip for precise boundaries; centroid CSV provided for circle-marker alternative

issue: Zone-level informal employment estimated from NBS NLFS 2022-2023 zone tables; not directly published at zone-quarter level
remediation: Figures consistent with national trends and NBS regional reports; used for chi-square test classification only
